titleStmt.title: SII 37.364: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 364. (A.R. No. B 7 of 1941-42.) Gōkarṇapuram (hamlet of Kollēṭikōṭa), Kaikalur Taluk, Krishna District.

summary.p: The Pānavaṭṭam of the liṅga in the temple of Gōkarṇēśvara.
This is dated Śaka 1175, Uttarāyaṇa Saṁkrānti, corresponding to 1252 A.D., December, 26.

It records the gift of 30 cows, money, land and a house site made by Vāsana Bōyuṇḍu, son of Malle Bōyuṇḍu of Guḍivāḍa and Erakāsāni for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Gōkarṇēśvara Mahādēva of Guḍipūṇḍi, it also refers to the measure called Nandimānika.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakavarṣaṁbulu 1175 gunēṁṭṭi Uttarāyana saṁkrāṁti nimittamuna śrīmatu vāsa
nabhōyuṁḍu tamataṁḍri guḍivāḍa mallebōyiniki tama talli Eṟakāsāniki dharmmuvugānu
guḍipūṁḍi gōkarnnērśva śrī mahādēvunikiṁbeṭṭina Akhaṁḍa dīpamu Okka
ṁṭṭiki mōdavulu (3) ṁsasya kṣētramukānukolani paḍmaṭakha 3 grihakṣētramu gu
ḍivāḍa dakṣiṇāna veḍalpu 12 niḍpu 15 mūḍlu vīniṁjekoni piccāṁḍi kommanabōyini koḍku bhīmanabōyuni
gallupōtanabōyuṁḍunumā bōyuṁḍu prōlebōyuṁḍu kommana bōyuṁḍunu naṁdi mānika nityamāneṁḍu
tōjaya
Digital edition of SII 37.364 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
